The post youbet – “Receive” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
youbet are raising the volume. The Brooklyn indie act is back with "Receive," the second single from their upcoming eponymous album, and it's a rager.

"I wrote this chorus I really connected with years ago and struggled ever since to find the right song to put it in," Nick Llobet explains. "'Receive' is my third attempt. There are a few disparate themes here: self deprecation, exploitation, family survival, anger."

The track follows "Ground Kiss." Watch the music video for "Receive" directed by Callan Thomas below.

youbet is out 5/1 via Hardly Art.
